pkgmetadata.longdescription: zaread is a simple POSIX shell script that uses zathura as a lightweight, read-only document viewer. PDFs, EPUBs, and DJVUs open directly in zathura. Everything else gets converted to PDF, cached in ~/.cache/zaread/, and opened from there. If the source file changes, zaread detects the difference and re-converts automatically.

use.flag: enable support for office documents, CSV and RTF
